name: Andritz AG
lede: Andritz runs three centers across three Indian cities. New Delhi, Bengaluru and Chennai, covering GCC/GIC and engineering & design, built over 28 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Andritz office in India. We map three, across three cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Andritz AG GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Andritz runs 3 verified centers across 3 Indian cities (New Delhi, Bengaluru, Chennai), covering GCC/GIC and engineering & design. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

titles.title: General Manager - Head of Department HR/IR

about.description: Andritz's India footprint covers New Delhi, Bengaluru and Chennai, spanning GCC/GIC and engineering & design. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D and HR for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 28 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does Andritz operate in India?
faq.a: Andritz operates 3 active centers in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Andritz have centers in?
faq.a: Andritz's India footprint includes New Delhi and 2 additional cities.

faq.q: What types of centers does Andritz run in India?
faq.a: Andritz runs GCC/GIC and 1 additional center type in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Andritz's India centers?
faq.a: Aggregate and center-level headcount for Andritz's India operations is available in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Andritz's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at Andritz's India centers, across Finance and other leadership functions. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
